resources.string: Vocal-Lock uses accessibility to detect when a protected app is on screen, then types your saved password when your voice key is recognised. No keystrokes, screen content, or personal data are sent anywhere. Everything runs fully on-device.
Autofill passwords using your voice — fully on-device.
Your passwords never leave this device. Not to us, not to anyone.
We built this app so even we can\'t see your data. That was the whole point.
No account. No server. No one waiting on the other end.
Everything is locked with keys that only your device holds.
Your voice unlocks your apps. Your data never touches a cloud.
The app owner has zero access to your passwords. By design, not by promise.
Encrypted on your phone. Decrypted on your phone. Nowhere else, ever.
Privacy isn\'t a feature here. It\'s the reason this app exists.
Not stored with us. Not backed up online. Yours, completely.
Even if someone asked us for your passwords, we\'d have nothing to give them.
